{"cards": [{"name": "Skyward Arbitrator", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W", "U"], "color_identity": ["W", "U"], "type_line": "Creature — Bird Wizard", "oracle_text": "Flying
Whenever ~ attacks, scry 1.
Whenever you scry, you gain 2 life.", "flavor_text": ""Each revelation brings clarity and peace in equal measure."", "power": "2", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Classic Azorius signpost combining white's lifegain and blue's scry. Flying is a shared keyword. The scry-on-attack triggers card selection, while gaining life from scrying rewards the control player for longer games. Stats are fair for the cost with upside abilities."}, {"name": "Bloodthirst Marauder", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B", "R"], "color_identity": ["B", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Vampire Warrior", "oracle_text": "Haste
Whenever ~ attacks, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, ~ gets +2/+0 until end of turn and you draw a card.
Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "3", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Rakdos build-around that rewards aggressive sacrifice strategies. Black provides card draw and life drain, red provides haste and temporary power boosts. The death trigger creates inevitability while the attack trigger offers explosive turns. Scales with other creatures and sacrifice outlets."}, {"name": "Wayfarer's Compass", "mana_cost": "{2}", "cmc": 2, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}.
{T}, Sacrifice ~: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": "Even the most confident explorers know when to ask for directions.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple mana rock that can cash in for land tutoring. Provides mana acceleration early or fixing later. The sacrifice ability is optional utility that doesn't feel mandatory. Clean common design with clear decision points."}, {"name": "Temporal Resonance Engine", "mana_cost": "{4}", "cmc": 4, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}{C}.
{3}, {T}: Target player draws a card, then discards a card.
{5}, {T}, Sacrifice ~: Take an extra turn after this one.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Complex artifact with escalating abilities. Mana acceleration, card selection, and ultimate extra turn. Each ability costs more but provides greater effect. The ultimate requires significant investment and telegraphs the threat. Tests multiple activated ability templating and mana costs."}, {"name": "Seraph of Divine Retribution", "mana_cost": "{3}{W}{B}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Legendary Planeswalker — Seraph", "oracle_text": "+1: You gain 2 life and each opponent loses 1 life.
-2: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
-7: Return all creature cards from your graveyard to the battlefield. They gain flying and lifelink until end of turn.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": "4", "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Orzhov planeswalker embodying white's lifegain and black's life drain. Plus protects via incremental advantage. Minus provides premium removal with white's compensation. Ultimate creates a devastating but fair board state. Starting loyalty supports the gameplan without being oppressive."}]}
